headline: Should You Invest in Prologis (PLD) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Prologis (PLD). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Prologis, Raises Price Target to $154
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $146 to $154.
